revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「[[岐阜県]][[安八郡]][[神戸町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{座標一覧}} {{DEFAULTSORT:こうとちよう}} [[Category:岐阜県の建築物 (市町村別)]] [[Category:神戸町|けんちくふつ]]」

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[岐阜県]][[安八郡]][[神戸町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{座標一覧}} {{DEFAULTSORT:こうとちよう}}
[[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:神戸町の建築物]]}}
==Old Content== (2025-05-15T23:54:39Z): (Bot: add category Category:Gōdo, Gifu)
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Hiyoshi_Shrine_(Gōdo)]].
(2025-05-15T23:54:34Z): (Bot: add category Category:岐阜県の建築物 (市町村別))
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Hiyoshi_Shrine_(Gōdo)]].
